title: Thames & Kosmos The Adventures of Robin Hood | Cooperative Story-Driven Family Board Game | Free-Movement Mechanic | 2–4 Players | Ages 10+ | By Michael Menzel
description: The year is 1193. Prince John has seized power and Nottinghamshire suffers under his corrupt rule. It's up to Robin Hood and his Merry Men — and you — to fight back. The Adventures of Robin Hood is a cooperative campaign board game where 2–4 players take on the roles of Robin Hood, Little John, Maid Marian, and Will Scarlet, working together through a series of connected adventures guided by a stunning 216-page hardcover storybook. Every session advances the story. Every decision matters. What makes this game unlike anything else is how you move. There are no squares on the board. Instead, players line up their wooden figures end-to-end to move freely across a richly illustrated map of Sherwood Forest, the village, and Nottingham Castle. The farther you want to reach, the more figures you use — a simple, intuitive, and genuinely physical mechanic that puts you in the scene. The board itself is alive. Interactive panels flip to reveal hidden guards, noblemen, and surprises. Colored discs drawn from a bag trigger dark events — guards attack, hope dips, Guy of Gisbourne stalks ever closer. Manage the Banner of Hope, steal carriages, defeat enemies, and complete the adventure's objectives before time runs out. If you fail, you read how the story ends — then pick up where you left off. Every replay adds knowledge that makes the next attempt more strategic. Designed and illustrated by Michael Menzel (Legends of Andor, Kennerspiel des Jahres 2013). For 2–4 players, ages 10 and up. Plays in 60–90 minutes. A quickstart sheet gets new players into their first adventure within minutes.
features: AN UNFOLDING STORY ACROSS MULTIPLE ADVENTURES — The year is 1193 and Prince John rules Nottinghamshire with an iron fist. Players take on the roles of Robin Hood, Little John, Maid Marian, and Will Scarlet in a cooperative campaign game where each adventure builds on the last. A 216-page hardcover storybook narrates the story and drives the action.

INNOVATIVE FREE-MOVEMENT MECHANIC — No squares, no set routes. Players move their figures by lining them up end-to-end across a beautifully illustrated 3D-effect game board. How far you go depends on which figures you use — an entirely original system that makes every movement feel tactile and physical.

A LIVING, CHANGING GAME BOARD — Interactive panels flip to reveal hidden guards, noblemen, carriages, and secrets as your adventure progresses. The board evolves as you play, with dark events triggered by colored discs keeping pressure on the team at all times.

COOPERATIVE TEAMWORK AGAINST THE GAME — Players never compete against each other. Instead, the whole team works together to complete adventure objectives, manage the Banner of Hope, defeat guards, steal carriages, and outmaneuver the villain Sir Guy of Gisbourne — or lose together. Scales with player count.

DESIGNED BY AN AWARD-WINNING CREATOR — Created and illustrated by Michael Menzel, designer of the Kennerspiel des Jahres–winning Legends of Andor. For 2–4 players, ages 10 and up, 60–90 minutes. A quickstart sheet gets you playing in minutes.
detailed_description: Lead Robin Hood and his Merry Men against Prince John's tyranny in this cooperative board game that plays like a storybook brought to life! 2–4 players (ages 10+) navigate beautifully illustrated maps of Sherwood Forest and Nottingham using a unique free-movement mechanic that replaces grid squares with flexible figure placement. Every decision matters as you advance through a connected campaign woven together by a 216-page hardcover storybook.

ADVENTURE IN FLIGHT HISTORY: First in Flight isn't just a board game; it's an exciting journey that brings aviation history to life. Delve into the early 20th century and embody aviation pioneers like the Wright brothers, Louis Bleriot and more. Immerse yourself in the strategic decisions they faced, as you balance risks and rewards. The game's beautiful artwork also adds an extra layer of visual appeal, enhancing the historical immersion and making every moment engaging and enjoyable.

BOARD GAMES FOR ADULTS AND GAMERS: First in Flight caters to both aviation enthusiasts and history lovers, making it a perfect choice for family game nights or gatherings with friends. Its informational aspect, combined with dynamic gameplay, ensures an enjoyable experience for teens and adults alike. It's a versatile game tailored for those aged 14 and above. Whether you're seeking cooperative or competitive play, this game delivers a captivating blend of learning and entertainment.

AWARD-WINNING GAME: First in Flight is the proud recipient of the 2024 MENSA Select Seal Award, recognizing its exceptional gameplay and intellectual challenge. Crafted by acclaimed directors Ben Rosset and Matthew O'Malley, known for hit titles like "The Search for Planet X" and "Between Two Cities," this game promises more than just entertainment; it's a carefully crafted adventure that will captivate both your intellect and imagination.

DIVERSE GAMEPLAY: Enjoy a rich strategic experience that caters to gamers who thrive on challenges and strategic decisions. First in Flight offers different modes suitable for solo play, 2-player and up to 4 players for an engaging group session. First in Flight is more than a game; it's an experience tailored for a diverse gaming audience: strategists seeking challenge, families craving quality time, and friends in search of competition can all find their place.
detailed_description: Experience the thrill of aviation history with First In Flight, a MENSA Award-winning strategy card game that challenges you to navigate historical flying adventures. This cooperative flight-themed game combines strategic depth with engaging gameplay, perfect for seasoned gamers and aviation enthusiasts alike. Whether you're plotting courses with a partner or taking on the skies solo, it's a game that rewards clever thinking and captures the golden age of flight.

Master devious tactics and counterplay in this intense 90-minute strategic showdown that brings superhero head-to-head battles to life. Perfect for 2 players ages 14+ who crave tactical, mind-bending gameplay!
short_title: Marvel: Crisis Protocol: Professor X & Shadow King

title: Colt Express Horses and Stagecoach Board Game EXPANSION Train Game, Programming Strategy Game, Wild West Adventure Game for Kids & Adults, Ages 10+, 2-6 Players, 40 Minute Playtime, Made by Ludonaute

The shape of a stagecoach can be seen close to the train, like a promise of new loot to grab. From now, the outlaws can also rely on their horse and some refreshments during the game. But beware of their new enemies and events...

DYNAMIC GAMEPLAY: Strategize to eject the shotgun-wielding guard and claim the strongbox inside the stagecoach.
HOSTAGES FOR RANSOM: Rescue hostages with unique abilities but be prepared for their lasting effects on your bandits.

With 2-6 players diving into 40 minutes of strategic scheming and wild turns, it's the perfect blend of cunning planning and unpredictable showdowns for ages 10 and up. Grab this expansion and discover what happens when the bandits level up their game!

title: Ravensburger Horrified Games - American Monsters - Strategy Board Game - Boost Critical Thinking & Teamwork - Cooperative Gameplay - Unique Monster Challenges - 1 to 5 Players - Adults & Kids 10+
description:
Dare to enter the underworld of Ravensburger Horrified - American Monsters, a cooperative strategy board game for kids and adults, where you and your friends must protect Cross Creek from 6 of the most terrifying creatures ever imagined! Face the unique challenges of Bigfoot, Mothman, the Jersey Devil, the Chupacabra, the Ozark Howler, and the Banshee of the Badlands - all who have escaped crypt. Work together to save Cross Creek before it's too late. A must-have for boys and girls ages 10-12, 11-13, 14-15 and older who cherish challenging board games. Gather your friends, embrace your inner hero, and prepare for a swampy fun adventure that promises hours of entertainment! Gather your team, develop your strategies, and prepare for an unforgettable battle against the legendary Ravensburger Horrified - American Monsters. Can you save Cross Creek before it's too late?
features: Embrace Your Inner Hero: Defend Cross Creek against 6 terrifying monsters including Bigfoot, Chupacabra, Mothman, the Banshee & more. Hours of exciting horrors for boys, girls, family and friends. Test your courage and tactical thinking to survive.

Engaging Strategic Family Gameplay: Defend your town and connect with your inner hero as you navigate the monster-infested Cross Creek with cunning tactics to outsmart your opponents utilizing critical thinking, problem solving & teamwork skills.

Visually Stunning: Immerse yourself in the terrifying world of Horrified - American Monsters from Ravensburger. Exquisite artwork and thematic components enhance every game. With 6 monsters, 7 heroes, and more, exciting gameplay & heroics abound.

Easy to Learn: Each monster offers a unique challenge, providing a fresh and distinct catastrophe with every game! Experience the thrill of mastering different play styles as you adapt your survival strategies with every 60-minute game session.

Game Night Excitement: Great for 1-5 heroes - Includes 1 game board, 6 monster mats, 6 monster figures, tiles, stands, tokens, easy instructions, and more. Everything for a thrilling, cryptid, monster-defeating experience.
detailed_description: Master the chaos of Horrified - American Monsters, a cooperative strategy game that brings 1-5 players together for 60 minutes of creepy fun and clever teamwork. Defend Cross Creek from six legendary monsters including Bigfoot, Mothman, and the Jersey Devil—each with unique challenges that demand strategy and coordination. Easy to learn but endlessly entertaining, this family-friendly adventure works perfectly for everyone from kids 10+ to hardened board gamers.

title: Mattel Crossed Signals Electronic Game with Pair of Talking Light Wands, Play Solo or with Up to 4 Players 8 Years & Older
description: Read the lights right or get mixed up with the exciting Crossed Signals electronic game! Choose one of 4 different games on the unit. Players see the lights and must act fast! Is there an arrow? Move the stick in that direction. See an "X"? Move in the opposite direction. Are both arrows lit? Shake it! Play solo or with up to 3 friends. Utilizing light and voice commands, The Crossed Signals game will get you on your feet to challenge your speed and accuracy -- including a dueling showdown where 2 players each take a stick! The player with the highest score wins! Up to 4 players can enjoy this frenzied game of lights and action! The Crossed Signals game brings active indoor and outdoor fun to any game night or party. features: Crossed Signals electronic game has players moving up, moving down and shaking it to light and voice commands!
Includes 4 games with various levels to challenge speed and accuracy while having a fast-paced blast!
Play a dueling showdown that has each player hold a light wand to see who can get it right first!
Players must react quickly to win! The player to earn the most points wins!
Play solo or with up to 4 players -- great for families, teens, kids and game night!
Crossed Signals electronic game is hilarious, frenzied fun and perfect for a fun-filled family game night!
detailed_description: Get ready for a high-energy rush of lights, sounds, and quick reflexes! Crossed Signals puts you on your feet to react to flashing commands and voice cues—dodge arrows, shake when both light up, and race against the clock to rack up points. Perfect for solo play or throwing down with friends and family, this game transforms game night into active, energetic fun for everyone.

title: Gamewright - Forbidden Jungle - Cooperative Board Game
description: Low on fuel, your rocket’s guidance system leads you to a mysterious, abandoned, spaceport on remote moon. The spacecraft is completely overgrown with jungle and is infested with a colony of spider-like aliens who don’t take kindly to their nest being invited. It soon becomes clear why the port was abandoned as whole sections of the station begin dropping into sinkholes! Your only hope of escape is to put a transportation portal back in service. Perhaps it will take you to the planet below? Unfortunately, all of the portals are overgrown and without power. Can you power up a portal and make your escape before it’s too late.
features: EXCITING COOPERATIVE ADVENTURE: Dive into the Forbidden Jungle, where you and your team must work together to survive and escape; Engage in thrilling game operation and strategic play from the creative mind of Matt Leacock.
IMMERSIVE GAMEPLAY EXPERIENCE: Discover new landscapes and characters with stunning visual elements; Designed to captivate both adults and families looking for adventure in a picture board game.
PERFECT FOR FAMILY GAME NIGHTS: Ideal for 2-5 players aged 10 and up; Enjoy a 30-45 minute session that immerses you into a world of mystery and teamwork.
BEAUTIFUL DESIGN AND ARTWORK: Each component is crafted with attention to detail; Aesthetically pleasing design ensures a captivating experience from start to finish.
DURABLE AND COMPREHENSIVE SET: Comes with 44 cards, 47 miniatures, pawns, and more; A complete set that offers endless hours of tactical fun and enhanced gameplay.
detailed_description: Round up 2-5 teammates for this heart-pounding 30-45 minute cooperative adventure where every choice matters. Brave a mysterious jungle full of dangers, solve its secrets, and race against time to escape before it's too late. With stunning miniatures bringing the action to life, this strategy-rich game will keep everyone fully engaged and on their toes.

title: Monopoly Board Game – Portland, OR Edition: 2-6 Players Family Board Games for Kids and Adults, Board Games for Kids 8 and Up, Great for Game Night

title: World Wonders Strategy Board Game by Arcane Wonders | Build Iconic Landmarks, Compete Strategically | for 1-5 Players | Ages 14+
description: Step into the role of an ambitious architect in a legendary age of Antiquity, where civilizations rise and fall based on the vision and wisdom of their greatest city planners. In this competitive strategy game, it is your duty to select the right constructions and magnificent monuments that will define your city’s identity, increase your productivity, and draw citizens seeking prosperity within its walls. Every structure you add influences your resource engine, shapes your population growth, and expands your prestige as a builder of enduring greatness. But the path to dominance is never easy. Other players are striving to build their own monumental cities, and they may desire the same prized constructions you’re targeting. With limited opportunities available, timing becomes crucial—delay too long and an opponent may claim the very building that would have completed your strategy. Every round challenges you to anticipate rival plans, react to changing conditions, and seize key advantages before they slip away. As your city grows, so does the complexity of your choices. Will you focus on generating abundant resources, attracting a flourishing population, or securing iconic monuments that define your civilization for centuries to come? Each decision helps shape your long-term strategy and brings you closer to earning the coveted victory rings that determine the ultimate winner. Rich in tactical depth yet accessible enough for new players, this game blends resource management, tile placement, and competitive city-building into an engaging experience filled with tension and triumph. At the end of the game, the architect with the greatest number of victory rings is crowned the champion and recognized as the master builder of the most magnificent city of Antiquity.
features: Build the greatest city of Antiquity by choosing strategic constructions and breathtaking monuments that boost resource production, attract citizens, and shape your civilization’s long-term success.

Compete for limited building opportunities as opponents race for the same powerful structures, forcing you to adapt your plans, outmaneuver rivals, and secure the most effective city-building combinations.

Each decision influences population growth, resource output, and your city’s prestige, rewarding clever tile placement, careful planning, and efficient management of your expanding ancient metropolis.
Dynamic player interaction creates constant tension as you monitor opponent strategies, block critical constructions, and claim essential monuments before other builders can seize them.
Victory goes to the architect who earns the most victory rings, proving themselves the master planner and creator of the grandest, most influential city in the world of Antiquity.
detailed_description: Become a legendary architect in this competitive strategy game where you'll construct magnificent monuments and shape iconic cities of antiquity. Race against other builders to claim the most prized constructions, managing your resources and timing your moves carefully as opportunities become scarce. Every structure you build fuels your city's growth and prestige—but your rivals are plotting their own paths to dominance.

description: A mysterious base. Prototype technology. Conspiracies within conspiracies. It’s hard to know who to trust, but there’s a job that needs to be done. And it’s up to Snake and his crew to do it. Metal Gear Solid: The Board Game puts players in the role of their favorite characters from the video game franchise. Across connected missions, they’ll have to infiltrate enemy territory and stealthily avoid patrols in order to accomplish missions and make it back out alive.
features: EPIC CAMPAIGN MODE: Dive into a 14-mission campaign filled with stealth, strategy, and iconic boss battles, bringing the Metal Gear Solid experience to your tabletop.
FLEXIBLE VR MISSIONS: Choose from 6 free-to-play VR Missions for a quick, intense gaming experience. All gear earned is unlocked for future missions.
UNIQUE BOSS FIGHTS: Each boss requires different strategies to defeat, offering a diverse and challenging gameplay experience.
ASYMMETRIC CHARACTER ABILITIES: Play as Solid Snake, Meryl, Otacon, or Gray Fox, each with unique abilities that provide new tactical options in every game.
SAVE THE WORLD: Assume the role of legendary characters to infiltrate enemy bases and sabotage prototype weapon systems, preventing world-ending threats.

Perfect for 1-4 players ages 14+, Metal Gear Solid: The Board Game combines tense decision-making with memorable encounters from the legendary franchise. Master the shadows, complete your objectives, and escape alive.

title: The Last of Us: Escape The Dark Board Game - Fantasy Horror Adventure, Cooperative Gameplay, Strategy Game for Adults, Ages 14+, 1-5 Players, 60-90 Min Playtime, Made by Themeborne
description: The Last of Us: Escape the Dark is an atmospheric survival board game set in the world of the critically acclaimed Naughty Dog™ video game franchise. To reach safety, players must explore the treacherous landscape together, risking extreme danger to gather vital supplies - balancing the need to survive today against the need to prepare for tomorrow… Powered by the latest evolution of the award-winning Escape the Dark™ system, it allows up to five players to experience The Last of Us™ in a whole new way. Can you Escape the Dark?
features: BASED ON AWARD-WINNING FRANCHISES: Experience the treacherous world of The Last of Us, now a major HBO TV series and a beloved video game from Naughty Dog, in an immersive board game format.
RICH, NARRATIVE GAMEPLAY: Join iconic characters like Joel and Ellie on a harrowing journey from a Quarantine Zone to Jackson, navigating through iconic locations filled with challenges.

DYNAMIC CHALLENGE SYSTEM: Powered by the latest evolution of the Escape the Dark system, featuring large, narrative-rich chapter cards that introduce complex scenarios including encounters with FEDRA agents, hunters, and the infected.
STRATEGIC DECISION-MAKING: Survival hinges on crafting and weapon upgrades directly inspired by the video game’s mechanics, requiring players to make strategic use of dice and item cards.

COLLECTOR'S ITEM: A must-have for fans with high-quality components and detailed artwork that bring the hauntingly beautiful atmosphere of The Last of Us to life. Ideal for 1-5 players, offering 60-90 minutes of engaging gameplay per session.
detailed_description: Gather your allies and brace for an atmospheric struggle for survival in this cooperative strategy adventure. Work together across 60-90 minutes to navigate treacherous terrain, manage vital resources, and make tough decisions that balance immediate survival with long-term strategy. Perfect for 1-5 players ages 14+, this is survival gaming where every choice matters—and failure hits different when your friends are counting on you.
short_title: The Last of Us: Escape The Dark

title: I Feel Attacked NSFW Edition Party Game for Adult Board Game Nights - Funny Card Games for Adults 18+, 4-10 Players - from Indie Boards & Cards The Publishers of Coup, Avalon and Terraforming Mars
description: I Feel Attacked: NSFW Edition is a party game about the people you love to hate, and would hate to be! Each round, the Judge will play a card, and it’s up to each player to pick the card in their hand that best matches the Judge’s card. The winner of the round will be the one whose card is judged to be just the right type of terrible! Want to add some arguing to the game? Give each player an I Feel Attacked card at the start of the game. After the Judge makes their choice, but before the point is awarded, if you are offended by the choice for whatever reason, you can play your I Feel Attacked card to give an impassioned speech about why the Judge’s choice is bad, wrong, unfunny, or gross, then find an alternate choice on the table that you think is better. All players vote between the Judge’s choice and the alternate. If you win or tie, you get the point instead, regardless of who originally put the winning card down. Each player may play their IFA card once during the game. Play for as long as you like. Whoever has scored the most cards at the end of the game wins!
features: I Feel Attacked NSFW is an outrageously naughty adult party game that hilariously mocks the most scandalous and cringe-worthy personality traits of people you love to hate. Definitely not safe for work!

An unforgettable night of debauchery in a box! The simple and easy to learn rules of this quick, fast-paced, and highly interactive social game will have you diving into the risqué action within minutes!

With a mind-blowing 275 cards, brace yourself for millions of jaw-droppingly perverse combinations that will have you howling with laughter, gasping in shock, or feeling personally attacked! This board game is perfect for families, parties, and groups looking for a popular and hilarious activity. Plus, we've included blank cards so you can create your own over-the-top and boundary-pushing caricatures.

It's the ultimate gift for open-minded and fun-loving adults who enjoy pushing the envelope with their card games. Perfect for wild and unforgettable parties, bachelorette parties, group entertaining, college ice breakers or family gatherings that will leave you craving more excitement and hilariously inappropriate moments!

Are people who send d**k pics the same people who sleep on a mattress on the floor? Or are they the same people who have a Tinder Platinum account? Maybe they actually support lesbians when they are doing it in a hot way, but... You’ll judge which match is the funniest (or cringiest)! This time with 500% more racy jokes!
detailed_description: Get ready for hilarious chaos and friendly arguments with I Feel Attacked: NSFW Edition, where 4-10 players compete to match outrageous cards with the Judge's prompts—and everyone gets a chance to call out bad choices with fiery speeches. This party game perfectly blends laughs, debate, and the kind of ridiculous moments that make for unforgettable game nights with friends. Perfect for adult groups who love games that spark personality-driven banter and unexpected twists.

title: Marvel: Crisis Protocol Angel & Archangel Character Pack - X-Men Expansion Set, Tabletop Superhero Game, Ages 14+, 2 Players, 90 Min Playtime, Made by Atomic Mass Games

title: Ravensburger One Piece Labyrinth - A Strategic Maze Challenge Featuring Monkey D. Luffy and Crew - Fun Family Game for 2-4 Players - Ages 7 and Up
description:
Dive into the world of One Piece with this special edition of the classic Labyrinth board game! The beloved maze‑shifting challenge transforms into a thrilling adventure for manga and anime fans as players join Monkey D. Ruffy and the Straw Hat crew in a constantly changing puzzle of shifting paths.

Who will outsmart the moving corridors and discover the quickest route through the maze? Only those who can cleverly adjust the maze and navigate its twists will succeed in finding their favorite characters and freeing them for the next exciting journey. Designed in the vibrant style of the iconic anime series, One Piece Labyrinth brings fan‑favorite characters and artwork directly to the table. As Monkey D. Ruffy, Lorenor Zorro, and others, players race to find the characters shown on their cards. Each turn begins by sliding a maze row to reshape the board—opening new paths while blocking others. Strategy, memory, and a bit of luck decide who will triumph.

With easy‑to‑learn rules and dynamic gameplay, this family‑friendly board game offers endless fun for 2–4 players ages 7 and up.
features: Classic family game meets trendy One Piece anime: game content in the style of the series makes fans' hearts beat faster
In this One Piece Labyrinth edition, 2-4 players aged 7 and up experience an adventure with the famous pirate crew, the Straw Hat Gang, and try to free their favorite characters from the labyrinth.

Simple rules, entertaining games and exciting rounds of play ensure long-lasting fun. With Ruffy, Zorro and many other characters from One Piece, this search and slide game is now also a very special fan item

The players change the maze by moving a row of tiles in turn. Each player pushes a tile into the maze. The player's aim is to collect the figures scattered around the maze. The figures to be found are shown on the cards that are dealt out at the start of the game
The maze has been delighting children and adults for decades and has become a must-have in every game collection

The ever-changing pathways create unpredictable challenges that blend clever tactics with exciting, fast-paced gameplay. Perfect for 2-4 players seeking a family-friendly strategy game that brings the anime adventure to the table.

title: Spin Master Games, Rhett & Link We’re Still Good Party Game, for Fans of the Comedy YouTube Show Good Mythical Morning, Hilarious & Memeable Play, 4-12 Players, Ages 16 & Up

title: Hunt A Killer: Dead Below Deck, Solve a Murder on a Yacht, Mystery Box Game for True Crime Fans, Murder Mystery Game for Adults, Play True Detective and Crack Unsolved Mysteries, Designed for Ages 14+
description: From the makers of Hunt A Killer, comes another thrilling murder investigation that can be played in just one sitting. This all-in-one board game for adults contains a murder mystery party in a box. The Hunt a Killer team of true-crime masterminds have meticulously created a living, breathing world where players become part of the story. With this authentic investigation kit, you’ll feel like you’re solving a real-life, high-stakes fatal crime. In Hunt a Killer: Dead Below Deck, one morning in the middle of a luxury Caribbean cruise, the charter, William Bonnys, wakes up hungover and heads to the sauna. There, he finds the body of Rachel Veinson, the yacht's stewardess. Captain Javier Rackhams attends to the scene and initially declares the incident an accident. Nevertheless, he still diverts course to Nassau, where the official authorities look over the scene, coming to the same conclusion. But was it truly an accident or were darker forces at play? Tap into your inner Sherlock Holmes and use forensic evidence to complete a timeline of the crime and eliminate suspects based on means, motive, and opportunity. Each suspect has a backstory, distinct handwriting, and other unique details that will help eliminate them from your list until only one remains. Discover the code to a locked tin, translate Morse code, interpret walkie-talkie messages, decipher a cryptic glyph language, and review maps of the ocean and the yacht itself. Realistic evidence and documents guide players through a challenging and immersive experience filled with unexpected twists and turns. Designed for 1-5 players, you can play it solo, as a couples game, or at your next murder mystery game night. In this unique unsolved case files game anyone can become an ace detective. Perfect as true crime gifts for those who love a good mystery, Hunt a Killer: Dead Below Deck will have everyone hooked. The mildly challenging yet riveting gameplay will keep your crew on their toes throughout the investigation.

Intrigue Ahead: Enjoy 90 minutes of gameplay with this thrilling murder mystery game. Sort though notes, create timelines, pore over evidence, and confirm alibis to crack the case and catch the killer.

title: Pathfinder Player Core - Second Edition Remaster Hardcover Rulebook for Tabletop RPG, Complete Character Creation Guide with 8 Classes & Ancestries
description:
Your Story Starts Here! Pathfinder Player Core presents a new entry point to Pathfinder Second Edition, with everything a player needs to learn how to play the game! Choose from eight ancestries, eight complete character classes, and hundreds of feats and spells to make unique characters ready for deadly adventures in a world beset by magic and evil! This 464-page hardcover tome is the definitive rules resource for all Pathfinder Second Edition players!
Pathfinder Player Core is the first core rulebook for the fully remastered Pathfinder Second Edition RPG! These rules are compatible with previous Pathfinder Second Edition rulebooks, incorporating comprehensive errata and rules updates and some of the best additions from later books into new, easier-to-access volumes with new presentations inspired by years of player feedback. Along with the GM Core, Monster Core, and Player Core 2, these books provide a new foundation for the future of tabletop gaming!
Pathfinder Player Core includes: Easier to Learn!We've taken feedback from the Beginner Box and the Core Rulebook and made this new entry into the Pathfinder Roleplaying Game easier to navigate and get right into the fun. Complete character creation rules, walking you through building a character by selecting your Ancestry, Background, and Class, with a focus on the bard, cleric, druid, fighter, ranger, rogue, witch, and wizard! Core ancestry options include human, dwarf, elf, gnome, goblin, halfling, leshy, and orc! A mountain of options allowing you to customize your character including versatile heritages, like the changeling and nephilim, skills and feats, and hundreds of spells (including dozens of new ones), ensuring that the character you build represents your hero not just in story, but in rules as well! Everything you need to know to start playing, from advice on how to explore the world to tips on surviving deadly combats with terrifying foes. A primer on the world of Lost Omens so that your character can be a part of an exciting and diverse world! Rules and tools to advance your character through play, taking them from a fresh-faced adventurer ready to take on the world to a veteran hero, wielding powerful magic that can reshape reality! Fully integrated errata from the first 4 years of Pathfinder Second Edition, including revisions to the witch, expanded options for every character class, streamlined spells, new equipment, and more!

This is the first Pathfinder product published under the new Open RPG Creative (ORC) license, giving players and Game Masters even more freedom for making their own creations based on Pathfinder Second Edition.
features: Complete player rulebook: Everything needed to create and play Pathfinder Second Edition characters including 8 ancestries (human, dwarf, elf, gnome, goblin, halfling, leshy, orc) and 8 classes (bard, cleric, druid, fighter, ranger, rogue, witch, wizard)
Easier to learn design: Streamlined rules based on feedback from Beginner Box and Core Rulebook make this the most accessible entry point into Pathfinder roleplaying for new and experienced players

Hundreds of customization options: Extensive selection of feats, spells, versatile heritages like changeling and nephilim, plus fully integrated 4-year errata with expanded class options and new equipment
Complete world primer included: Features Lost Omens setting information, exploration guidance, combat survival tips, and character advancement rules from novice adventurer to legendary hero

Hardcover durability and quality: Premium binding and high-quality paper designed to withstand frequent use during gaming sessions, making it the definitive rules resource for Pathfinder Second Edition players
